summary: Made two surgical seam edits: tightened the opening temporal handoff from chapter 1's near-dawn aftermath and added a bakery-window detail in the Main Street passage to point more cleanly toward chapter 3's opening image. Core beats, dialogue register, and plot causality were left intact.
edits: Shifted the opening line from "The next morning" to "By morning" to carry the prior chapter's dawn aftermath more directly into chapter 2.
Added a brief description of the bakery's dust-blinded front pane while Thea watches Main Street, seeding chapter 3's opening focus on Hester and the cake-case window.
Checked for verbatim style-bible calibration example lines and found none in the chapter text.
